title: Light Echoes from Supernova 2014J in M82
use_role: first direct numeric light-echo radius source
main_points: Reports HST imaging on 2014-09-05 and 2015-02-02 showing light echoes at about 0.6 arcsec and possible inner echoes at about 0.4 arcsec; major echo corresponds to about 12 pc and material about 330 pc in the foreground.

title: Interstellar-medium mapping in M82 through light echoes around supernova 2014J
main_points: Reports multiple-epoch measurements of size and surface brightness at ~216, ~277, ~365, and ~416 days after B-band maximum; diffuse echo cloud located about 100 to 500 pc in the foreground.
